query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.codigo,
  p.descricao,
  p.valorTotal,
  p.valorPago,
  p.valorGlosado,
  p.motivoGlosa,
  JSON_EXTRACT(p.dadosExtras, '$.situacaoItem') as situacaoItem,
  JSON_EXTRACT(p.dadosExtras, '$.erroTiss') as erroTiss,
  a.convenioId,
  c.nome as convenioNome
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id
WHERE c.nome LIKE '%Vivacom%'
AND (p.valorGlosado > 0 OR JSON_EXTRACT(p.dadosExtras, '$.situacaoItem') = 'GLOSADO')
LIMIT 20;
